bullets:
Integrate reactor-core-lib@1.2.12 & consolidate code

Upgrade to reactor-core-lib v1.2.12 and refactor host layer to rely more heavily on the core library:

- Move audio managers into services-audio.js; delete isolated audio module files
- Consolidate presentation logic into presentation.js; remove separate part/upgrade files
- Move achievement toasts into achievement-controller.js; delete template file
- Move audio system attachment into ui.js
- Retarget PartSet and UpgradeSet initialization to consume session catalogs
- Fix bootstrap order: attachCoreBridge before partset.initialize
- Simplify E2E helpers to use coreBridge.placePart directly
- Remove unused domain modules (balance.js, statDispatcher.js, traits.js)
- Clean up unused constants and dead code
- Enforce core bridge requirement: throw instead of fallback in critical paths
- Update tests to query session active part lists instead of engine getters
